ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_uuid" TEXT /* Unique UUID for each customer */,
  "limit_bal" INTEGER /* Credit limit balance */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the customer (1: male, 2: female) */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level (1: graduate school, 2: university, 3: high school, 4: others) */,
  "marriage" TEXT /* Marital status (1: married, 2: single, 3: others) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the customer */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer account was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_history" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "pay_1" INTEGER /* Payment status in the past month */,
  "pay_2" INTEGER /* Payment status 2 months ago */,
  "pay_3" INTEGER /* Payment status 3 months ago */,
  "pay_4" INTEGER /* Payment status 4 months ago */,
  "pay_5" INTEGER /* Payment status 5 months ago */,
  "pay_6" INTEGER /* Payment status 6 months ago */,
  "pay_date_1" TEXT /* Date of payment in the past month */,
  "pay_date_2" TEXT /* Date of payment 2 months ago */,
  "pay_date_3" TEXT /* Date of payment 3 months ago */,
  "pay_date_4" TEXT /* Date of payment 4 months ago */,
  "pay_date_5" TEXT /* Date of payment 5 months ago */,
  "pay_date_6" TEXT /* Date of payment 6 months ago */,
  "payment_method_1" TEXT /* Payment method in the past month */,
  "payment_method_2" TEXT /* Payment method 2 months ago */,
  "payment_method_3" TEXT /* Payment method 3 months ago */,
  "payment_method_4" TEXT /* Payment method 4 months ago */,
  "payment_method_5" TEXT /* Payment method 5 months ago */,
  "payment_method_6" TEXT /* Payment method 6 months ago */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bill_amounts" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "bill_amt1" INTEGER /* Bill amount in the past month */,
  "bill_amt2" INTEGER /* Bill amount 2 months ago */,
  "bill_amt3" INTEGER /* Bill amount 3 months ago */,
  "bill_amt4" INTEGER /* Bill amount 4 months ago */,
  "bill_amt5" INTEGER /* Bill amount 5 months ago */,
  "bill_amt6" INTEGER /* Bill amount 6 months ago */,
  "bill_date_1" TEXT /* Date of the bill in the past month */,
  "bill_date_2" TEXT /* Date of the bill 2 months ago */,
  "bill_date_3" TEXT /* Date of the bill 3 months ago */,
  "bill_date_4" TEXT /* Date of the bill 4 months ago */,
  "bill_date_5" TEXT /* Date of the bill 5 months ago */,
  "bill_date_6" TEXT /* Date of the bill 6 months ago */,
  "due_date_1" TEXT /* Due date of the bill in the past month */,
  "due_date_2" TEXT /* Due date of the bill 2 months ago */,
  "due_date_3" TEXT /* Due date of the bill 3 months ago */,
  "due_date_4" TEXT /* Due date of the bill 4 months ago */,
  "due_date_5" TEXT /* Due date of the bill 5 months ago */,
  "due_date_6" TEXT /* Due date of the bill 6 months ago */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bill_amounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_amounts" (
  "payment_amt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment amount record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "pay_amt1" INTEGER /* Payment amount in the past month */,
  "pay_amt2" INTEGER /* Payment amount 2 months ago */,
  "pay_amt3" INTEGER /* Payment amount 3 months ago */,
  "pay_amt4" INTEGER /* Payment amount 4 months ago */,
  "pay_amt5" INTEGER /* Payment amount 5 months ago */,
  "pay_amt6" INTEGER /* Payment amount 6 months ago */,
  "pay_date_1" TEXT /* Date of payment in the past month */,
  "pay_date_2" TEXT /* Date of payment 2 months ago */,
  "pay_date_3" TEXT /* Date of payment 3 months ago */,
  "pay_date_4" TEXT /* Date of payment 4 months ago */,
  "pay_date_5" TEXT /* Date of payment 5 months ago */,
  "pay_date_6" TEXT /* Date of payment 6 months ago */,
  "payment_method_1" TEXT /* Payment method in the past month */,
  "payment_method_2" TEXT /* Payment method 2 months ago */,
  "payment_method_3" TEXT /* Payment method 3 months ago */,
  "payment_method_4" TEXT /* Payment method 4 months ago */,
  "payment_method_5" TEXT /* Payment method 5 months ago */,
  "payment_method_6" TEXT /* Payment method 6 months ago */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_amt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_amounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "default_payments" (
  "default_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each default payment record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "default_payment_next_month" INTEGER /* Whether the customer will default in the next month (1: yes, 0: no) */,
  "default_date" TEXT /* Date when the default payment was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("default_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_default_payments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "education_cat" TEXT /* Category of education (e.g., university) */,
  "graduate_school" INTEGER /* Indicator for graduate school (1: yes, 0: no) */,
  "high_school" INTEGER /* Indicator for high school (1: yes, 0: no) */,
  "others" INTEGER /* Indicator for others (1: yes, 0: no) */,
  "university" INTEGER /* Indicator for university (1: yes, 0: no) */,
  "year_completed" TEXT /* Year when the education was completed */,
  "institution_attended" TEXT /* Institution attended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessment" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* Risk score for the customer */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the risk assessment was performed */,
  "risk_model" TEXT /* Risk assessment model used */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessment_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the note */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_notes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback or complaint */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was received */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the feedback has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the feedback */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "physical_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "secondary_phone_number" TEXT /* Secondary phone number of the customer */,
  "secondary_email_address" TEXT /* Secondary email address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_contacts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the customer */,
  "employment_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the employment started */,
  "employment_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the employment ended */,
  "current_employment" INTEGER /* Whether the customer is currently employed by the same employer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "income_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of income */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Source of income (e.g., salary, rental income) */,
  "income_date" TEXT /* Date when the income was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "transaction_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., purchase, refund) */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant */,
  "merchant_category" TEXT /* Category of the merchant (e.g., grocery, entertainment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
